wnba.headline: Plum returns, but Wings beat Sparks behind Bueckers, Ogunbowale
wnba.summary: Kelsey Plum scored 27 points in her return from a three-game injury absence, but it wasn't enough as the Wings beat the Sparks behind a career-high 14 assists from Paige Bueckers and season-high 30 points from Arike Ogunbowale.

wnba.headline: Bonner helps the short-handed Mercury beat the Fire 78-72
wnba.summary: — DeWanna Bonner scored a season-high 19 points, Natasha Mack added 16 points and the short-handed Phoenix Mercury beat the Portland Fire 78-72 on Friday night.

wnba.headline: Arike Ogunbowale's 30 points, Paige Bueckers' career-high 14 assists lead Wings past Sparks 104-96
wnba.summary: — Arike Ogunbowale scored 30 points and made six 3-pointers, Paige Bueckers had 18 points and a career-high 14 assists and the Dallas Wings beat the Los Angeles Sparks 104-96 on Friday night for their fourth straight victory.

wnba.headline: Lynx's Miles breaks Clark's WNBA rookie record with 8 3-pointers
wnba.summary: Lynx guard Olivia Miles made eight 3-pointers Thursday night against the Valkyries, breaking a WNBA rookie record that Fever star Caitlin Clark tied in 2024.

wnba.headline: Fever's Clark vomits at half, recovers to score 17 vs. Dream
wnba.summary: Despite feeling ill and vomiting at halftime, Caitlin Clark played on and finished with 17 points and eight assists to help the Fever top the Dream 83-71 in Indiana's Commissioner's Cup opener.

tennis.headline: Italians Cobolli, Arnaldi advance to French Open semifinals

f1.headline: What is F1's 'ADUO'? The new engine rule that could shake up 2026 and Mercedes, Ferrari title race
